title: paris verticillata var. obovata
intro: Paris verticillata var. obovata, also known as the wild spurge or obovate Paris, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Parisaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paris verticillata var. obovata include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its roots and rhizomes in water or alcohol, and it is often used in the form of teas, tinctures, or infusions.
